data.description: FRAC-25 local review surfaced inconsistent h2 rendering: 9 of 12 .text-title sites in Campus.tsx have 'normal-case' modifier, 3 don't — those render uppercase via the global h1-h6 cascade. The utilities lie about their rendering (DESIGN.md says mixed-case). Fix: drop 'text-transform: uppercase' from the global h1-h6 block (keep font-family, italic, tracking); add explicit 'text-transform: none' to .text-title and .text-subtitle.
data.title: Drop global h1-h6 uppercase rule; codify case on .text-title and .text-subtitle

data.body: Live review by user during FRAC-25 walkthrough — 3 outlier h2 sites (Meet the Space L383, Events L435, Build with us. L518) confirmed mixed-case in browser. .text-display sites still uppercase. typecheck + tests baseline-only.
